name: HR manager notification policy example
answer:
Managers must notify People Operations within five business days of a qualifying employee absence.
Managers must notify People Operations within ten business days of a qualifying employee absence.
People Operations may request additional documentation after an absence lasts more than ten business days.
Managers receive an automatic $500 stipend for every qualifying absence.

sources.title: HR Manager Notification Policy
sources.content:
Managers must notify People Operations within five business days of a qualifying employee absence.
The notification must include the employee's name, absence dates, and leave category.
People Operations may request additional documentation when the absence lasts more than ten business days.
